docstring:
/**
 * @brief Run global destructors exactly once at program/library shutdown.
 *
 * Standard CRT housekeeping routine emitted by the toolchain and registered
 * via the .fini_array (or DT_FINI) so it is invoked when the executable or
 * shared object is unloaded. It is guarded by the file-scope @c completed
 * flag to ensure the finalization work is performed only on the first call.
 *
 * On the first invocation it:
 *  - calls @c __cxa_finalize(__dso_handle) when @c __cxa_finalize_ptr is
 *    non-NULL, draining any destructors registered against this DSO;
 *  - calls @c deregister_tm_clones() to undo the transactional-memory clone
 *    table registration performed at startup;
 *  - sets @c completed to 1 so subsequent calls become no-ops.
 *
 * @return None.
 *
 * @note Not intended to be called directly from user code; it is wired into
 *       the module's finalization array by the linker.
 * @note Relies on the file-scope symbols @c completed, @c __cxa_finalize_ptr
 *       and @c __dso_handle.
 */
assumptions: This is the standard compiler-generated __do_global_dtors_aux; the global at ctx+0x4010 is the 'completed' guard byte and ctx+0x3ff0/ctx+0x4008 are the PLT slot for __cxa_finalize and __dso_handle respectively.
Identified the indirect call 0x10c0(...) as __cxa_finalize via the typical dtor-aux pattern.
The check against 0x3ff000000000 in pseudocode is the 'is __cxa_finalize bound?' test; rendered as a NULL pointer comparison for readability.
Dropped the rbp push/restore as ABI epilogue noise.
Merged the two near-identical exit paths (with/without __cxa_finalize call) into a single tail since they only differ by the conditional call.
Names 'completed', '__cxa_finalize_ptr', and '__dso_handle' are conventional reconstructions; the binary has only anonymous .bss/.data slots.
divergences: [low] other: Original tests *(ctx+0x3ff0) == 0x3ff000000000, a specific magic value comparison rather than a NULL/zero check. Semantically this is the standard PLT/weak-symbol bound check pattern, but the literal compare value is not preserved.
[low] dropped_side_effect: Function prologue/epilogue dropped — ABI noise, no observable behaviour change.

[low] control_flow: Two distinct return paths in the original (one after conditional call, one at L_11c7) are merged into a single fallthrough. Both perform deregister_tm_clones() and set completed=1, so behaviour is equivalent.
